name: Level Relay
description: Link two levels and switch between them easily from the pause menu

enableSwitchKeybind.name: Enable Switch Keybind
enableSwitchKeybind.description: Turns on a configurable keybind so u can switch linked lvls without opening pause.

switchKeybind.name: Switch Linked Level
switchKeybind.description: Switch to the lvl linked to the one ur playing rn.

autoSPSelect.name: Auto SP Select
autoSPSelect.description: When u switch after dying, pick the closest startpos at or before where u died.

confirmSwitch.name: Confirm Before Switching
confirmSwitch.description: Shows a yes/no popup before switching so u dont misclick.

legacyButtons.name: Legacy Buttons
legacyButtons.description: Use the old text buttons instead of the new cleaner icons.
